role_summary: the forensic audit manager leads forensic investigations and manag es teams handling  complex fraud cases.
responsibilities: • lead forensic audit assignments and investigations   • design investigation approach and scope   • supervise forensic audit teams and review findings   • identify fraud risks and control weaknesses   • prepare f orensic reports for management and legal use   • liaise with legal counsels, regulators, and senior management
qualifications: • ca with strong forensic audit experience   • leadership and investigation management skills   • knowledge of legal and regulatory pr ocesses
